name: audit log entry from pr-corpus learning includes the source PR numbers that supported the pattern
command: mkdir -p compliance pr-corpus && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":42,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":99,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":7,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --audit-log compliance/audit.log 2>err.txt && grep -q '"source_prs":\[42,99,7\]' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
